design.theme: A vaulted stone chamber lit by candlelight, where silent scribes transcribe neural architectures into executable code. Illuminated manuscripts line the walls — each page a frozen computation graph rendered in gold leaf and vermillion. Quill pens inscribe attention patterns onto parchment; their ink flows from wells of distilled gradient descent. A vast loom in the corner weaves parallel computation threads into executable tapestries. At the central assembly desk, architectures are compiled from modular fragments — each scribe contributing a layer, a head, a residual connection. The activation candle illuminates hidden layer activations in shifting colors as data flows through. This is where thought becomes program — the sacred art of program synthesis.
design.ml_concept: Program Synthesis / Code Generation — Neural program synthesis, code generation, computation graph compilation, attention-based code synthesis, programmatic inductive biases, parallel code execution, and the transformation of learned representations into executable programs.
